name: Resident middle income with full IETC
description: Resident earning NZD 60,000 per year with full IETC (compare with non-resident test)

sources.description: Calculated using 2026-27 PAYE rates, ACC levy (1.75%), and full IETC
sources.notes: PAYE: 10.5% + 17.5% + 30%. ACC: 1.75%. IETC: Full $520 (income $60,000 is between $24,000 and $66,000). Compare with non-resident test to see IETC benefit.
